name: cloud-storage-tools
description: Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, and MEGA style user-file storage tools.

interface.longDescription: Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, and MEGA style user-file storage tools. This is not for AWS, GCP, Azure, hosting, or PaaS infrastructure.
defaultPrompt: Organize files in encrypted cloud storage.
Create a shareable cloud storage link.
